TodoAction.description: Server-inferred (or model-declared via status) action metadata on a todo. DD-3 removes the architecture_change keyword rule.

fields.needsApproval: boolean — true gates the step; set by push/destructive inference or by awaiting_approval status

TodoStatus.description: Todo lifecycle status. DD-2 adds the reserved awaiting_approval value as the model's explicit handback key.

AutonomousPolicy.requireApprovalFor.description: List of action.kind values that must suspend before the model enters them. DD-1 makes this ENFORCED (previously dead config).

WorkflowSuspend.description: Deterministic suspend state set when the gate fires (DD-1) or the model requests handback (DD-2).

fields.stopReason: 'approval_required:<kind>' — added to NON_RESUMABLE_WAITING_REASONS so the loop does not auto-resume
fields.idempotency: skip if the step is already blocked/waiting (no double-suspend vs tool-permission gate)

ParalysisGateGuard.description: DD-4 input to the paralysis runloop: whether the current non-progress is gate-induced and must be exempted from the paralysis ladder.

fields.gateInduced: boolean — head todo awaiting_approval/needsApproval-blocked OR session in non-resumable waiting_user
fields.effect: when true: do not increment recoveryCount, do not raise ParalysisDetectedError
